articles.title: Earthquake with 6.1 magnitude hits offshore Cuba, shaking buildings in Havana
articles.description: HAVANA (AP) — A 6.1 magnitude earthquake struck near western Cuba on Monday, shaking buildings in Havana and beyond. No injuries or damage were immediately reported. The quake struck at a depth of six miles (10 kilometers) in waters just west of the capital, according to the U.S. Geological Survey.
